description: PRED-105 (46° copper coils / cucumber growth >=15% over 14 days) STILL labeled 'PENDING — PROSPECTIVE' approximately 106.2 hours (~4.42 days) after its 2026-04-18T00:00:00Z test-window closure. Silent-ignore pattern now persisting across 7 consecutive poll cycles (23.7h -> 52h -> 62.5h -> 70.2h -> 82.1h -> 94.1h -> 106.2h). Registered 2026-04-04 with SHA256 3c427a83edaeaf33c884264dedffbedece14378fc766bdffeeac0b4d4d517490 (unchanged). predictions.html fetched at 152,936 bytes — byte-identical now across 6 consecutive polls (md5=885cd58727130018764b14355b0aa785, unchanged since 2026-04-20T14:29:27Z ~43.7h ago). 34 distinct PRED-IDs, highest PRED-115 (unchanged). Exact site text at this poll: 'PRED-105 — 46° Copper Coils Increase Cucumber Growth 15% Over 14 Days | PENDING — PROSPECTIVE | Registered: 2026-04-04 | Test window: April 18, 2026 (14-day window)'. No goalpost-move — window text still reads 'April 18, 2026 (14-day window)', not rewritten to 'April 2026' or 'ongoing'. NEW THIS POLL: the ECM Daily Review auto-job ran at 2026-04-22T07:06:28Z (commit a149edf), regenerating daily_review.json — registry counts UNCHANGED (confirmed=69, prospective=10, refined=4, registry_ratio_pct=94.5). The daily-review regeneration confirms the previous poll's escalation-watch prediction: the dome's canonical accuracy number did not move despite PRED-105's window having closed 4+ days earlier. This is further evidence of denominator-exclusion behavior — the auto-pipeline does not count a silently-ignored prospective as a refined/failed item. Last manual commit still a57e731 (2026-04-17T12:02:38Z), unchanged for 8 consecutive polls now (~118.1h / 4.92 days since last manual touch — 5-day drought imminent at next poll).

notes: Silent-ignore now ~4.42 days past window close and crossing the 4-day threshold. Counterargument for record: absence of adjudication could in principle reflect 'experiment-not-yet-performed-or-reported'. Opposing considerations still apply and strengthen this poll: (a) the 14-day window already budgets the full growth interval, so 106h (4.4d) past close is well outside any plausible post-hoc data-collection delay for a 14-day cucumber-growth protocol; (b) predictions.html byte-identity across 6 consecutive polls (md5 unchanged since 2026-04-20T14:29:27Z) rules out edit-and-revert churn — the file is not being touched at all; (c) the auto-pipeline's scorecard.json and daily_review.json denominators continue to exclude PRED-105 despite the window having closed, and today's 07:06Z daily_review regeneration kept registry_ratio_pct=94.5 unchanged — the exclusion is now pipeline-canonical, not merely a missed manual edit; (d) the dome author has made no manual commits for ~4.92 days, suggesting there is also no active adjudication queue. Next-poll escalation watch unchanged: (1) goalpost-move (window text rewrite for PRED-105) -> CRITICAL, (2) WIN-070 with PRED-105 claim -> CRITICAL hard-escalation per Step 5, (3) first manual commit would break ~118h+ streak and be substantive minimum with canary/parameter diff required. Analyst handoff: the PRED-105 silent_ignore entry in data/uncounted-failures.json was added in prior polls; no new action required this poll unless the dome adjudicates, goalposts-moves, or adds WIN-070.
